templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@supermarketitaly.com Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Shipping Time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1 to 2 days and we usually ship via FEDEX. Once shipped, it will take 1 to 7 days.

templates.name: Does your business cut or slice your cheeses/meats?
templates.content: No, we don't. All cut cheeses and sliced meats are either received pre-cut or sent to certified licensed businesses that cut our meats and cheeses for us.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://supermarketitaly.com/policies/refund-policy

templates.name: How much does shipping cost
templates.content: Shipping cost is based on the distance from our warehouse in Lyndhurst, NJ to the destination zip code, as well as which shipping method is chosen.

templates.name: Do you ship outside the United States?
templates.content: Currently, we don't ship outside the United States.

templates.name: Store location
templates.content: You can find us at 1275 Valley Brook Ave Lyndhurst, NJ.

templates.name: How accurate are the weights of your products?
templates.content: All valued weights of our products are approximate weights according to our item listings. We guarantee that all our products such as cheese and meats will be sent closest to its approximate weight if not greater than what you purchased.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://supermarketitaly.com/collections/clearance

templates.name: How long can your cheeses be stored for?
templates.content: That depends mainly on what kind of cheese. However, cheeses stay freshest stored on the bottom shelf of the refrigerator. It can be stored for several months if unopened and approximately one month when opened and properly wrapped. Wrap any unused portion in one layer of tight clean plastic wrap. Re-wrap this way after every use to maintain its freshness. Be aware that softer cheeses typically have a shorter shelf life than harder cheeses.

templates.name: How will our orders be packaged?
templates.content: Orders with multiple items may both be packaged together or in separate boxes depending on texture, size, weight, perishable or non-perishable, and convenience. We ship all perishables within 2 days, with dry ice and regular ice in insulated packaging at no additional cost to the customer.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at support@supermarketitaly.com Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Rewards
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://supermarketitaly.com/pages/rewards

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at (201) 729-0739 (Mon-Fri,  9AM-5PM EST and Sat, 9AM-3PM EST) or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://instagram.com/supermarketitaly and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/supermarketitaly

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: We can't add any items to your order after it was placed. However, I can check if we can still cancel your order so you can place a new one. What's the order number and your email address?

templates.name: Where do your products come from?
templates.content: All our products are sourced from the highest quality vendors in Europe.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: You can check out our Affiliate Program here: https://supermarketitaly.com/pages/affiliate-program

templates.name: Customer wants to edit shipping address
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@supermarketitaly.com Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://supermarketitaly.com/collections/clearance

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://supermarketitaly.com/pages/track-your-order?srsltid=AfmBOopx-eaouf9EOH67stNkYsTUxJC_83kJV2lTXqiJC0EThzrEfqRc

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $99. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Why did your free shipping minimum threshold increase?
templates.content:
Due to rising costs in shipping supplies, transportation, and import expenses, we are adjusting our free shipping threshold from $85 to $99.
This decision was not made lightly, but it allows us to continue providing you with the high-quality products and service you expect from us. We truly appreciate your understanding and support as we navigate these challenges.
